narration: 10 May. New king of the agents.
Hermes Agent just took number one on OpenRouter's global ranking — 271 billion tokens. OpenClaw held that crown yesterday. Claude Code sits at number four, 3.4x behind.
OpenAI's open-source flagship dropped 21 ranks on OpenRouter this week. Now 36th. Free isn't enough when the competition ships daily.
Tencent's Hy3 jumped 28 ranks — from 38th to 10th. At six cents per million tokens, it's a fraction of the price of everything above it.
Kimi K2.6 holds number one by developer spend. Seventy-five cents per million tokens. Developers voting with their wallets.
That's the briefing. Every number links to its source. gawk dot dev.
